steps.title: Interpret f(3) using the given definition
steps.content: The function $f(t)$ represents the account balance $t$ years after the initial deposit. Therefore, $f(3)$ is the balance at $t = 3$, which is 3 years after the deposit.

steps.title: Translate the statement
steps.content: The statement $f(3) \approx 7,430.64$ means the account balance 3 years after the deposit is approximately 7,430.64 dollars. This is the total balance in the account, not a change from the initial amount.

steps.title: Identify the correct interpretation
steps.content: The value 7,430.64 is the total balance at $t = 3$ years, not an increase from the initial 7,000 (the actual increase is $7,430.64 - 7,000 = 430.64$). The correct answer correctly states that the balance is 7,430.64 after 3 years. That confirms A is correct.
